name: Christopher Reed
title: The Arrogant Strategist

basic.name: Rising Star
basic.description: Multiple punches finished with a kick. Applies Fire Elemental Accumulation and inflicts Airborne.

core.name: Offensive Pass
core.description: Gathers mana and fires a magic bullet. Applies Fire Elemental Accumulation and grants Super Armor.

skill.name: Nitro Kick
skill.description: Knee kick into spinning aerial slam kick. Applies medium Fire Elemental Accumulation. First hit inflicts Airborne, final hit inflicts Knockdown. Grants Super Armor.

skill.name: Foul Play
skill.description: Hurls a large magic sphere. Applies medium Fire Elemental Accumulation. Final hit inflicts Airborne. Grants Super Armor.

support.name: Rapid Kick
support.description: Spinning aerial slam kick. Applies heavy Fire Elemental Accumulation. First hit inflicts Airborne, final hit inflicts Knockdown.

qte.name: Rising Performance
qte.description: Leaps into the air and strikes downward with elbow. Applies weak Fire Elemental Accumulation and inflicts Airborne. Triggers on Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate, Stun/Blind, or Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Zero to a Hundred
ultimate.description: Hurls a massive meteor-like concentrated ball of magic. Applies heavy Fire Elemental Accumulation. First hit inflicts Airborne, final hit inflicts Knockdown.

passive.name: Spiritual Body Manifestation
passive.description: Charged by Rising Star, Offensive Pass, Nitro Kick, Foul Play. At 100%, Special Core Attack activates automatically: Enhanced Basic Attack, Core Attack and Basic Skill. All cooldowns reset, Fire Elemental Accumulation +25%, Damage increase +150%. Duration: 30s (removed upon using Zero to a Hundred). Also inflicts Burn (200% DEF damage every 3s, 10s) via Rising Performance, Rapid Kick, and Zero to a Hundred.

advancements: If Fire Elemental Accumulation Immunity is active, hits charge Spiritual Body Manifestation Gauge (CD: 15s). Fire team members' Basic/Ultimate skills charge the gauge. Finishing Catch damage +25% vs Burn targets.

Spiritual Body Manifestation activation recovers 30% HP and grants Shield (100% DEF, 20s). Hitting Burn targets grants Competitive Spirit (CD: 2s): Fire damage +165%, Finishing Catch damage +15%, 15s.
+5% Fire damage per Fire ally in party (all Fire team members).

Fire Overload triggers recover 20% Power Gauge and reset Zero to a Hundred CD (CD: 30s). Hitting Fire Overload targets inflicts Blazing Shock (Fire Overload damage taken +20%, Unrecoverable, 30s). Spiritual Body Manifestation activates Victor's Spirit (Zero to a Hundred damage +250%, 60s).
